summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TMS SAAS Phase 3 Orders & Shipments functionality. All core APIs functional with 100% success rate. Canada-first design with automatic tax calculation working perfectly.
passed_tests: POST /api/operations/orders - Create order with automatic Ontario tax calculation (HST 13%)
GET /api/operations/orders - List orders with filtering capabilities
GET /api/operations/orders/{id} - Get order details with customer info and shipments
PUT /api/operations/orders/{id} - Update order with automatic tax recalculation
POST /api/operations/orders/{id}/confirm - Confirm draft order status transition
POST /api/operations/orders/{id}/cancel - Cancel order with reason tracking
POST /api/operations/shipments - Create shipment linked to order with cost calculation
GET /api/operations/shipments - List shipments with various filters
POST /api/operations/shipments/{id}/dispatch - Dispatch to carrier with rate assignment
POST /api/operations/shipments/{id}/status - Update status with location tracking (en_route_pickup, at_pickup, loading, loaded, in_transit)
GET /api/operations/shipments/{id}/tracking - Get tracking events (manual events work correctly)
POST /api/operations/shipments/{id}/tracking - Add tracking events
Margin calculation: (customer_rate - carrier_cost) / customer_rate working correctly (27.03% verified)
Tax calculation based on customer province: Ontario HST 13% = $221 on $1700 subtotal
Order-shipment relationship tracking and status updates
Automatic total recalculation when rates updated
Status history tracking for all shipment status changes
Authentication and tenant isolation working properly
Multi-entity integration (customers, carriers, shippers, consignees)
Canada-first design with proper provincial tax handling
Full CRUD operations on orders and shipments with proper validation
success_percentage: Backend: 100% success rate (21/21 tests passed). No frontend testing required as per request.
